query: motion blur photograph long exposure subject in motion
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / intentional_blur: motion blur, long exposure subject motion - artistic streaks and dynamic blur

response.objective_caption: A figure in motion wearing flowing white garments with dark sections, captured mid-movement with draped fabric extending outward, set against horizontal bands of green, blue, and cream color in the background.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A figure in motion wearing flowing white garments with dark sections, rendered almost unrecognizable through heavy motion blur that smears the subject into streaks of fabric and color; the deliberate blur transforms the scene into an abstract composition of horizontal green, blue, and cream bands with ghostly textile forms dissolving across the frame.
